author: mark
text:
Add gates link type for post-review close blockers

Parent tasks holding `gates` links cannot close while referenced
children are still open. Enforced in both close paths. LinkType
gains a lenient Unknown(String) variant for forward compatibility.
Breaking bump to 0.3.0 because pre-0.3.0 binaries predate the
lenient parser and will hard-error on the new variant.

LinkType and Link moved to src/link.rs to keep task.rs under the
300-line cap. README ships a "Gates: post-review blockers"
section. 10 new integration tests, 100% coverage maintained.
